name: side-note2
description: Side comments for both humans and agents.

scripts.test: rm -rf .test-dist && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && find .test-dist/tests -type f -name '*.test.js' -exec node --test {} +
scripts.release:check: npm run test && npm run build
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json README.md

author: vicky
